```
s = "aaabbcccca"
out = ""
i = 0
while i < s.len {
  ch = s[i]
  count = 1
  while i + count < s.len && s[i + count] == ch {
    count += 1
  }
  out = out + ch + (count | str)
  i = i + count
}
print out
```

```
items = [
  {name: "widget", qty: 4, price: 2.5},
  {name: "gizmo", qty: 2, price: 7.25},
  {name: "bolt", qty: 10, price: 0.1}
]

totals = items.map i -> i.qty * i.price
grand = totals.sum

best = items | top 1 (i -> i.qty * i.price) | first

print grand
print best.name
```

```
s = "the cat sat on the mat with the cat"
words = s.lower.split " "
freq = words.counts
top_two = freq.pairs | top 2 .v | sort (x -> -x.v)
for pair in top_two {
  print "{pair.k} {pair.v}"
}
```

```
s = "a=1,b=22,c=333"
pairs = s.split ","
total = pairs | map (x -> x.split "=" | last | int) | sum
print total
```

```
celsius = [12.5, 30.0, -5.0]
fahrenheit = celsius.map c -> c * 9 / 5 + 32
print fahrenheit.max
```

```
describe v = match v {
  int n -> "int {n+1}",
  float f -> "float {f}",
  str s -> "str {s.len}"
}

print (describe 42)
print (describe 3.5)
print (describe "abc")
```

```
sentence = "pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs"
words = sentence.split " "
longest = words | top 1 .len | first
print longest
avg_len = words | map .len | sum | float / words.len
print (avg_len | int)
```

```
sentence = "pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs"
words = sentence.split " "
longest = words | top 1 .len | first
print longest
avg_len = (words | map .len | sum).float / words.len
print (avg_len | int)
```

```
vals = ["12", "x", "7", "-", "30"]
total = 0
bad = 0
for v in vals {
  n = int v ? 0
  if (int v) ? false else true { bad += 1 }
  total += n
}
print total
print bad
```

Wait, let me fix the error detection:

```
vals = ["12", "x", "7", "-", "30"]
total = 0
bad = 0
for v in vals {
  parsed = (int v) ? err ""
  match parsed {
    err _ -> { bad += 1 }
    int n -> { total += n }
  }
}
print total
print bad
```

Actually, simpler approach:

```
vals = ["12", "x", "7", "-", "30"]
nums = vals.map (v -> int v ? 0)
bads = vals.keep (v -> match (int v) ? false { err _ -> true, _ -> false })
print (nums | sum)
print bads.len
```

```curt
valid = ages.keep x -> x >= 0 and x <= 120
invalid = ages.keep x -> x < 0 or x > 120
print valid.len
print invalid.len
print (valid | sum)
```

```
cfg = fs.read "app.cfg" ? ""
data = cfg.json ? {}
port = data.port ? 8080
host = data.host ? "localhost"
mode = if data.debug { "debug" } else { "prod" }
print "{mode} {host}:{port}"
```

```
cfg = fs.read "app.cfg" ? {}
orders = fs.read "orders.json" ? []
name = cfg.json.name ? "unknown"
paid = orders.json | keep .paid
count = paid.len
total = paid | map .amount | sum
print "{name}: {count} paid, total {total}"
```
